case_title: JOSE GUTIERREZ FLORES VS. ADOLFO NERY GOMEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-24-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,768.19 FILED BY FLORES, JOSE GUTIERREZ AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, ADOLFO NERY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED DEC-04-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, ADOLFO NERY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLORES, JOSE GUTIERREZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ, ADOLFO NERY $785.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $835.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
